name: GROOVY COMPANY, INC.
summary: PART I General Overview Groovy Company, Inc. (the Company) was incorporated in the State of Nevada on July 8, 2009, under the name Santa Pita Corp. The Companys original mission was to operate an internet portal for dentists and patients to access dental information, as well as a teeth-whitening business. On July 30, 2012, the Company redirected its focus toward precious metal exploration and mining. Concurrent with this strategic shift, the Company was renamed Santo Mining Corp. On April 2, 201...
